label: Open config folder
command: Z=~/.var/app/dev.zed.Zed/config/zed; [ -d "$Z" ] || Z=~/.config/zed; cd $Z && command -v zsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && zsh || command -v bash >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash || command -v sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && sh

label: Sync config folder
command: Z=~/.var/app/dev.zed.Zed/config/zed; [ -d "$Z" ] || Z=~/.config/zed; cd $Z && git pull && git add . && git commit -m "sync" && git push && echo "Config folder synced successfully"
